blockingIssues.description: `buildCountryCoOccurrences()` still stores only one representative event ID for each entity-derived country pair, so `arc.storyIds` omits other contributing stories and ArcPanel's shared-intel drilldown remains incomplete for those geopolitical arcs.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Document an explicit manual-review fallback when `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` Task launches fail, including what artifacts to write and how to report the infrastructure issue.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: This osint-advanced rerun again failed to launch `scrutiny-feature-reviewer` because the Task path exited with `Invalid model: custom:GPT-5.4-(XHigh)-3`, so the two fix reviews had to be written manually even though the skill only specifies the subagent workflow.
